title: Sumerian/Akkadian: Ur-Namma the Canal Digger
description: From the Sumerian/Akkadian corpus: Ur-Namma the Canal Digger.
introduction: From the Sumerian/Akkadian corpus: Ur-Namma the Canal Digger.

translation.text: From 'Ur-Namma the Canal Digger': One of the 117 major literary works of ancient Mesopotamia, recorded on clay tablets in cuneiform script and preserved in the great libraries of Sumer, Akkad, Babylon, and Assyria.
